Sec. 1  
Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a major urban area in Nigeria, known for its rapid development and diverse population. It is one of the fastest-growing cities in the country, with a mix of residential, commercial, and industrial zones. The city is home to several important institutions, including the University of Lagos and the Lekki International Airport. Its strategic location on the Lagos-Ibadan Highway makes it a key hub for transportation and trade.
